title: Trump tells Congress ceasefire means he does not need their approval for Iran war
summary_full: The president writes that hostilities "have terminated" because of the ceasefire, arguing he does not need congressional authorisation.
summary_public: The president writes that hostilities "have terminated" because of the ceasefire, arguing he does not need congressional authorisation.

IR.label: positive
